zh.Northallerton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾諾薩勒頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Strangways於大約1356年出生在英國越可爾斯亞頓時，他的父親John Strangways33歲，母親Alice Berkeley22歲。他和Matilda Cheswyk至少有1個兒子。他去世於1429年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾諾薩勒頓享年74歲。

zh-hans.Northallerton, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾諾薩勒頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Strangways于大约1356年出生在英国越可爾斯亞頓时，他的父亲John Strangways33岁，母亲Alice Berkeley22岁。他和Matilda Cheswyk至少有1个儿子。他去世于1429年在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾諾薩勒頓享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strangways
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Strangeway
meanings: English: locative from Strangeways in Manchester (Lancs), probably ‘(place by) a stream with a strong current’: Old English strang + (ge)wæsc.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Strangways was born about 1356, in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Strangways, was 33 and his mother, Alice Berkeley, was 22. He had at least 1 son with Matilda Cheswyk. He died in 1429, in Northallerton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Strangways est né environ 1356, à Sneaton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Strangways, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Matilda Cheswyk. Il est décédé en 1429, à Northallerton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.Northallerton, Yorkshire, England: Northallerton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Strangways um 1356 in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Strangways 33 und seine Mutter Alice Berkeley 22. Er hatte mit Matilda Cheswyk mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1429 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Northallerton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Strangways è nato il circa 1356 nel Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Strangways, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Matilda Cheswyk. Morì nel 1429, nel Northallerton, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Strangwaysが約1356年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスネアトンで生まれた時，父John Strangwaysは33歳，母Alice Berkeleyは22歳であった。彼はMatilda Cheswykとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1429年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアノーサラートンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Strangways(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 요르크실르 스니앳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Strangways(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Matilda Cheswyk(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 노르솔레르턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Strangways родился около 1356 г. в местности снитон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Strangways было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Matilda Cheswyk. Он умер в 1429 г. в местности нортоллиртон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
